title: Manually Reset System Metrics From the Overall System Aveva API Page
summary: Reset system metrics manually from the Overall System Aveva API page when a manual reset is needed. The source states that metrics are normally reset automatically when a new sort plan is loaded, but the page also provides a Reset Metrics control for manual reset.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when a manual reset of system metrics is needed from the Overall System Aveva API page.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for the UPSHMI A tag reset method, because the source mentions that method but does not provide a supported procedure.
Do not use this runbook to infer confirmation prompts, post-reset indicators, or alternate reset workflows not shown in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Overall System Aveva API page, identify the Reset Metrics control, and perform the manual reset using the page control.

safety_notes: Use only the Reset Metrics control described on the Overall System Aveva API page.
Do not invent or perform unsupported steps for the UPSHMI A tag method from this source alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
Reset Metrics control on the HMI page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is available and includes the Reset Metrics control.

visual_references.description: Overall System Aveva API page showing the Reset Metrics control and related page options.

steps.title: Open the Overall System Aveva API page
steps.purpose: Navigate to the page that contains the manual Reset Metrics control.
steps.instruction: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System Aveva API page is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The page is open and the Reset Metrics control is visible on the page.
steps.failure_condition: The page cannot be opened or the expected page does not show the Reset Metrics control.

actions.label: Open Overall System Aveva API page
actions.exact_action: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Aveva API page with the Reset Metrics control.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Overall System Aveva API page is not available.
Escalate if the expected Reset Metrics control is not present on the page.

source_evidence.text: Open the Overall System Aveva API page. [Image support needed: screen showing the Overall System Aveva API page with the Reset Metrics control.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overall System Aveva API page shows Reset Metrics, Reset Tipper Stats, Bag Out control, Get metrics, Zone configuration, and Get errors.
The artifact shows the Overall System Aveva API page with options including Reset Metrics.

steps.title: Locate and verify the Reset Metrics control
steps.purpose: Confirm that the correct page and control are being used and verify the source note about reset behavior.
steps.instruction: Locate the Reset Metrics control on the page and verify the page note that metrics are reset when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.
steps.expected_result: The Reset Metrics control is identified and the page note confirms both automatic and manual reset behavior.
steps.healthy_condition: The page shows the Reset Metrics control and indicates that metrics reset automatically when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.
steps.failure_condition: The Reset Metrics control cannot be identified or the page does not match the source-supported reset behavior.

actions.label: Identify Reset Metrics control
actions.exact_action: Locate the Reset Metrics control on the page and verify the page note that metrics are reset when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Reset Metrics control is not available.
Escalate if the page content does not match the source-supported reset behavior.

source_evidence.text: Locate the Reset Metrics control on the page and verify the page note that metrics are reset when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.

Metrics are reset automatically when a new sort plan is loaded, and they can also be manually reset from the page shown in the training segment.

steps.title: Use Reset Metrics to perform the manual reset
steps.purpose: Execute the manual system metrics reset from the supported page control.
steps.instruction: Use the Reset Metrics control to perform the manual reset.
steps.expected_result: System metrics are manually reset from the page.
steps.healthy_condition: The manual reset action is performed using the Reset Metrics control on the Overall System Aveva API page.
steps.failure_condition: The Reset Metrics control does not perform the reset as expected.

steps.title: Do not use the unsupported UPSHMI A tag method from this source
steps.purpose: Prevent use of an alternate method that is mentioned but not procedurally supported in the source.
steps.instruction: If applicable in the local setup, note that the speaker states UPSHMI can also reset the metric by hitting an A tag, but no further source-backed steps are provided for that method.
steps.expected_result: The operator recognizes that the UPSHMI A tag method is only mentioned as a reference and is not executed from this runbook.
steps.healthy_condition: Only the page-based Reset Metrics method is used from this runbook.
steps.failure_condition: An attempt is made to perform the UPSHMI A tag method without source-backed steps.

actions.label: Acknowledge unsupported alternate method
actions.exact_action: Note that the speaker states UPSHMI can also reset the metric by hitting an A tag, but no further source-backed steps are provided for that method.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the requested reset depends on the UPSHMI A tag method, because this source does not provide the procedure.
Escalate if an alternate reset method is required beyond the page-based Reset Metrics control.

success_criteria: The Overall System Aveva API page is accessed.
The Reset Metrics control is identified on the page.
The manual reset is performed using the Reset Metrics control.
No unsupported UPSHMI A tag procedure is attempted from this runbook.
healthy_conditions: The Overall System Aveva API page shows the Reset Metrics control.
The page note indicates that metrics are reset when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.
System metrics are manually reset from the page.
failure_conditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is not available.
The Reset Metrics control is not available.
The Reset Metrics control does not perform the reset as expected.
The procedure requires the UPSHMI A tag method, which is not provided by this source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Reset Metrics control is not available or does not perform the reset as expected.
Escalate if an alternate reset method is required beyond the page-based Reset Metrics control.
Do not invent steps for the UPSHMI A tag method because the source does not provide the procedure.
